# Faith Works Outdoor Services
> Faith Works Outdoor Services is an owner-operated outdoor property services company based in Auburndale, FL. Land Clearing, Pond Bank Clearing, Ditch Clearing & Outdoor Property Services across Central Florida communities within a 70-mile radius of Auburndale.

## Agent Links
- [Homepage](https://faithworksclearing.com/)
- [Services hub](https://faithworksclearing.com/services.html)
- [Contact / estimate request](https://faithworksclearing.com/contact.html)
- [Service areas](https://faithworksclearing.com/service-areas.html)
- [About Tyler Edwards](https://faithworksclearing.com/about.html)
- [Project gallery](https://faithworksclearing.com/gallery.html)
- [Sitemap](https://faithworksclearing.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Full LLM summary](https://faithworksclearing.com/llms-full.txt)

## Identity
- Legal name: Faith Works Outdoor Services LLC
- Brand: Faith Works Outdoor Services
- Owner: Tyler R. Edwards
- Website: [https://faithworksclearing.com/](https://faithworksclearing.com/)
- Email: tyler@faithworksclearing.com
- Phone: (863) 272-1596 (+1-863-272-1596)
- Location: Auburndale, FL 33823
- Service radius: 70 miles from Auburndale
- Google Maps: [Faith Works on Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Faith+Works+Outdoor+Services+LLC/@28.154233,-81.941877,11z)

## Core Services
- [Land Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/land-clearing.html)
- [Trail Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/trail-clearing.html)
- [Brush Clearing & Brush Cutting](https://faithworksclearing.com/brush-clearing.html)
- [Pond Bank Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/pond-bank-clearing.html)
- [Ditch Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/ditch-clearing.html)
- [Debris Removal](https://faithworksclearing.com/debris-removal.html)
- [Pool Dig-Out Support](https://faithworksclearing.com/pool-dig-out-support.html)
- [Tractor Services](https://faithworksclearing.com/tractor-services.html)

## Estimate Process
- Text project photos to (863) 272-1596 for faster quotes
- Use the contact form at [https://faithworksclearing.com/contact.html](https://faithworksclearing.com/contact.html)
- Owner (Tyler R. Edwards) reviews scope before scheduling

## Services Not Offered
- Installing underground utilities
- Stormwater systems
- Sewer systems
- Water mains
- Utility trenching
- Site development
- Engineered drainage systems
- Pool installation or licensed pool contracting (we support dig-out cleanup under your pool builder)
- Excavation contractor / utility infrastructure work
